history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian couple, a boy and a girl, are sitting at a table outdoors at night, possibly at a street food stall or casual eatery. They are both smiling and holding chopsticks, appearing to be in the middle of a meal. The girl is on the left, wearing a light blue t-shirt with a graphic that says "COSMOS UNIVERSE" featuring a sun and moon. She has dark hair pulled back and is looking directly at the camera. The boy is on the right, wearing a black t-shirt with "ON" printed on it in white. He has dark, curly hair and is also looking towards the camera.

In front of them on the table are black plates of food, which appear to be fried chicken with some sort of coleslaw or salad. There are also two glasses of iced drinks with red straws, and a pink packet of "Jolly" brand tissues. The background is dimly lit and appears to be a somewhat rustic outdoor setting with bamboo poles, tarps (one red, one dark blue), and what looks like a food stall counter with equipment. The lighting is artificial and creates a warm, somewhat grainy atmosphere. The overall mood is casual, happy, and intimate. The color palette is dominated by the dark background, the brown tones of the food, and the vibrant pink of the tissue packet, contrasted with the lighter colors of the couple's clothing and the drinks.
